headline: Entergy (ETR) Stock Looks Overvalued Even After Its Strong Run
summary: Entergy stock has turned in a strong long term return, yet current checks suggest investors are now paying a premium, with both the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples pointing to an overvalued profile rather than a clear bargain. Entergy has returned 163.1% over 5 years, which puts extra focus on whether today’s price is already baking in much of the company’s progress. The new partnership with Mitsubishi Heavy Industries to cut carbon capture and...
